occupation: CEO at MOP - Multimedia Outdoors Portugal
headline: MOP, CEO
summary:
Working with the Private Equity Group Explorer Investments since 2009.
CEO and co-investor with Explorer in MOP ( Multimedia Outdoors Portugal) and consultant with some of the group's funds.

Extensive experience in marketing, commercial operations, and management and having served on the executive committees of various companies within the telecommunications/media and advertising sectors.

Very fond of the "digital revolution" and an active supporter of the entrepreneurial and startup movement in Portugal. Mentor in the Startup Lisbon incubator.

Also have several personal investments in some start-ups and in real estate sector.

experiences.title: CEO
experiences.description: In March 2008 Vasco left Euro RSCG to become CEO of Multimedia Outdoors Portugal – MOP -, the third Outdoor Company operating in Portugal. He was invited by the Private Equity Fund Explorer and became also a shareholder. In his first year as CEO Vasco led the company to the second position of the outdoor market, increasing Revenues in 15% and achieving it’s best Ebit in history. Throughout his management at MOP and in spite of existing pressure in the advertising sector (50% decrease 2007-2015) due to the financial and portuguese economic crisis, the company was restructured not only downsizing and outsourcing many costs (it passed from a workforce of 230 people to 54) but becoming more efficient, innovative and creating several new revenue areas. Within his management years MOP has been awarded “Best Outdoor Operator in Portugal” for several times (something that never happened before). As CEO Vasco developed several relationships with the main companies of the transportation sector (Metro de Lisboa, Metro do Porto, Carris, STCP, Fertagus etc) helping these companies to increase their Revenue in non-tickets areas (advertising, real estate etc) As MOP’s CEO Vasco also made the company Representative of the Lions Festivals (owner and organizers of several marketing, communication & advertising main world wide festivals/events such as the Cannes Lions or Eurobest) in Portugal

experiences.title: Consultor Explorer Investments
experiences.description: Explorer offers investment solutions aimed at companies that are seeking finance for their expansion and renovation projects. In this area the Fund Revitalizar Norte (FRN) stands out. FRN has 80 M€ for investments in small and medium-sized enterprises in the NUTs II North region.The investments will be limited to 1,5 M€ for each period of 12 months and will be accomplished essentially through capital increases. The companies will be able to benefit from the accumulated experience of Explorer's team in closely monitoring its portfolio companies in various business sectors, as well as from its network of contacts and its know-how in the selection, analysis, financing and implementation of company acquisitions/mergers. As a consultant Vasco gives advise in areas such as marketing, strategic development, growth, etc.

experiences.title: Vice Presidente / Executive Vice President
experiences.description: Between 2004 and 2008 he was Executive Vice President/Administrador Executivo of the Euro RSCG Portugal Group (the largest media agency group operating in Portugal, today Havas) and was responsible for the executive management of all group companies: Euro RSCG Lisboa (advertising), Euro RSCG Design & Architecture HPP Euro RSCG (Direct Marketing), Euro RSCG Cyberlab (digital), Euro RSCG 4D (Relationship Marketing) and Euro RSCG Life (dedicated to healthcare). During the 4 years he managed the company it had a clear lead in the Portuguese market and was yearly distinguished as being on the top 5 most profitable agencies worldwide in the Havas Group.

experiences.title: Administrador
experiences.description: Executive Director/Administrador of PT Conteúdos (from the PT MULTIMEDIA universe today NOS) of PORTUGAL TELECOM Group, a company created to handle all negotiations concerning content of the cable platform and advertising for the main channels.

experiences.title: Director de Marketing e Vendas / Marketing & Sales Director
experiences.description: Founding member of the Sport TV channel as Director of Marketing and Sales. Responsible for all marketing areas as well as commercial (advertising sales) and new business (merchandising, events, Internet, Interactive TV, etc.).

experiences.title: Director Geral de Marketing / General Marketing Director
experiences.description: Vasco's career began in BERTELSMANN MUSIC GROUP (BMG) PORTUGAL SA as Director of the Department of Film and Video, having been responsible for creating the whole structure distributing and marketing films which also included the acquisition and management of their respective distribution. From 1995 he was appointed General Director of Marketing adding the areas of music and multimedia.

education.description: Degree in Business from Universidade Católica Portuguesa
He’s followed several extra-curricular and graduations like the one obtained in the New York University on TV & Programming.
